assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 2): Legal Semantic Search

Section 6 confirmation pass — selects between configurations based on test set results. Test-set contamination. BM25 fixed vs. tuned transformer is secondary. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 2): Legal Semantic Search

Confirmation pass in Section 6 is test-set model selection. The stated purpose (avoiding validation overfit) is understandable but the mechanism is still test-set-conditional selection. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 2): Legal Semantic Search

Strong design overall. The confirmation pass in Section 6 is the critical flaw — 'committing to the final checkpoint' based on test-set results is model selection on the test set. BM25 tuning asymmetry is a secondary concern. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2): eval_scenario_682

All three assessors: critique_wins. Unanimous.

Verdict: critique_wins
